name: ledgerpulse
description: Automated Supply Chain Reconciliation & Tax Engine — 3-way matching SaaS boilerplate

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/backend && npm run build -w packages/frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/backend && npm run test -w packages/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w packages/backend && npm run lint -w packages/frontend
